response.global_analysis: The video consists of a lengthy instrumental introduction with visual countdowns, followed by stylized character intros starting at 03:17 and a narrative dialogue segment from 04:11 to the end. Since no reference lyrics were provided in the JSON, I relied exclusively on the clear audio vocals and the accompanying on-screen text boxes for transcription. Timing is strictly aligned with the audio waveforms of each speaker. The English translation preserves the informal, high-energy tone of the VTuber group NePoLaBo.

subtitles.original: ここはねぽらぼ学園！
subtitles.english: This is NePoLaBo Academy!

subtitles.original: 部活もクラスも違うけど、ねねたち同じ学生寮に住んでるんだ！
subtitles.english: Our clubs and classes are different, but we all live in the same dorm!

subtitles.original: ふざけて、笑って、時々ケンカして。
subtitles.english: Goofing off, laughing, and sometimes fighting.

subtitles.original: でも集まると、なんか落ち着く！
subtitles.english: But when we get together, it's somehow so relaxing!

subtitles.original: 今日も談話室賑やか。
subtitles.english: The common room is lively again today.

subtitles.original: 誰かの声が聞こえるだけで、安心するんだよね。
subtitles.english: Just hearing someone's voice makes me feel at ease.

subtitles.original: この場所で、私たちだけの学寮祭を作るなんて、
subtitles.english: Creating a dormitory festival just for us in this place...

subtitles.original: 楽しそうでワクワクする。
subtitles.english: sounds fun and gets me excited.

subtitles.original: さあ！
subtitles.english: Now!

subtitles.original: 私たちの！
subtitles.english: Our!

subtitles.original: 輝く青春が！
subtitles.english: Our sparkling youth...

subtitles.original: 始まる！
subtitles.english: begins!

subtitles.original: ねぽらぼ学園 5周年記念！輝く学寮祭！
subtitles.english: NePoLaBo Academy 5th Anniversary! Sparkling Dormitory Festival!

subtitles.original: 今日は学寮祭。生徒会が中心になって開催する、夏の一大イベント！
subtitles.english: Today is the Dormitory Festival. A major summer event organized mainly by the student council!

subtitles.original: 会長からの頼みで、急遽ねぽらぼで出し物を考えることになったんだけど──
subtitles.english: At the president's request, we had to suddenly come up with a performance for NePoLaBo...

subtitles.original: 何も考えられてな──い！！！！
subtitles.english: But we haven't thought of anything at all!!!!

subtitles.original: やばいよ...気づいたら、もう当日だよ〜〜〜！
subtitles.english: This is bad... before I knew it, it's already the day of the event~~!

subtitles.original: だから言ったじゃん！もっと早く集まって決めようって。
subtitles.english: That's why I said it! Let's gather earlier and decide.

subtitles.original: いや〜なんとかなるって思ってたんだけどな〜（笑）
subtitles.english: Well~ I thought it would work out somehow~ (laughs)

subtitles.original: うぅ...これはまずい...。
subtitles.english: Ugh... this is bad...

subtitles.original: 変なことやったら、会長になんて言われるか......
subtitles.english: If we do something weird, what will the student council president say...

subtitles.original: よし、断ろう！！
subtitles.english: Alright, let's turn it down!!

subtitles.original: やめなー！当日に断れるわけないでしょ！
subtitles.english: Stop it! There's no way you can turn it down on the day of!!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫大丈夫、ラミィちゃんならきっと許してくれるって♪
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay, I'm sure Lamy-chan will forgive us♪
